title: rubus × mollicaulis
intro: Rubus × mollicaulis, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or thimbleberry, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × mollicaulis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
